zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie Collingridge於1481年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾厄普頓時，她的父親Edmund Collingridge32歲，母親Alice Goodridge27歲。她於1498年與Lord John Woodward在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾厄普頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年12月1日在英國英格蘭波克夏厄普頓享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏厄普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjorie Collingridge于1481年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾厄普頓时，她的父亲Edmund Collingridge32岁，母亲Alice Goodridge27岁。她于1498年与Lord John Woodward在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾厄普頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1560年12月1日在英国英格兰波克夏厄普頓享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏厄普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Collingridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name perhaps from Cowan Bridge in Lancs, recorded as Collingbrigke in about 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie Collingridge was born in 1481, in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Edmund Collingridge, was 32 and her mother, Alice Goodridge, was 27. She married Lord John Woodward in 1498, in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 December 1560, in Upton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79, and was buried in Upton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie Collingridge est née en 1481, à Upton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Collingridge, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Goodridge, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Lord John Woodward en 1498, à Upton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 décembre 1560, à Upton, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Upton, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjorie Collingridge 1481 in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Collingridge 32 und ihre Mutter Alice Goodridge 27. Sie hat 1498 in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Lord John Woodward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Dezember 1560 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Upton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Upton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Collingridge è nata il nel 1481 nel Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Edmund Collingridge, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Alice Goodridge, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Lord John Woodward nel 1498, nel Upton, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 dicembre 1560, nel Upton, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Upton, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjorie Collingridgeが1481年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウプトンで生まれた時，父Edmund Collingridgeは32歳，母Alice Goodridgeは27歳であった。1498年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウプトンでLord John Woodwardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年12月1日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアウプトンで79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアウプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Collingridge(이)가 1481년 영국 벅잉함실르 업턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Collingridge(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Goodridge(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 업턴에서 Lord John Woodward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 12월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 업턴에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 업턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Collingridge nasceu em 1481, em Upton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Collingridge, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice Goodridge, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord John Woodward em 1498, em Upton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de dezembro de 1560, em Upton, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Upton, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie Collingridge родилась в 1481 г. в местности уптон, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Collingridge было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Goodridge, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord John Woodward в 1498 г. в местности уптон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 декабря 1560 г. в местности уптон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности уптон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lord John Woodward en 1498, en Upton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de diciembre de 1560, en Upton, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Upton, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
